Hello, I am Shafequl and I am working as a graphic designer for last few years. I have helped small and medium businesses make their brand identity strong and designing new packaging and labels for their products. I can take on challenges and love to work creative projects. I specialize in :

1) Logo Designing
2) Branding & Corporate Identity
3) Company Profile Design
4) Social media promotional banners
5) Brochures & flyers design
6) Product packaging

Feel free to contact me if you have any question, I look forward to working with you.

Kind Regards
~ Shafequl Optimize this for upwork

Hello, I am Shafequl and I am an experienced graphic designer who specializes in logo designing, branding and corporate identity, company profile design, social media promotional banners, brochures and flyers design, and product packaging. I have worked with small and medium businesses to help them establish a strong brand identity and design eye-catching packaging and labels for their products. 

I am always up for a challenge and love to work on creative projects. If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to reach out to me. I look forward to working with you on Upwork. 

Best regards, 
Shafequl

Hi, I am a label and packaging designer who enjoys working with clients who appreciate professional label & packaging.  I have designed packaging and labels for 100+ companies throughout the world.

I understand the importance of professional packaging and labeling and how they can affect in the success of a business and that's why I create custom labels and packaging for your products that STANDS OUT from the rest of the crowd.

I have worked with more than 100 business and helped them with their packaging & label design. Whether you have a CBD, cosmetics or any other product line you definitely need a professional label design for your bottle or products. 

I guarantee high quality label and packaging design. So contact me now with all the details of your product and I will design an amazing label or packaging for it.

Thank you
~Shafequl Optimize this for upwork as well

Hello, I am a professional label and packaging designer with extensive experience working with clients looking for high-quality packaging and labeling design. I have designed and developed packaging and labels for over 100 companies worldwide. 

I believe that professional packaging and labeling can greatly contribute to the success of a business. For this reason, I create custom labels and packaging for your products that STAND OUT from the rest of the crowd. 

I specialize in creating label designs for a variety of product lines, including CBD, cosmetics, and many other industries. I guarantee high-quality label and packaging design to help your product get noticed. 

So, if you're looking for a top-of-the-line designer who can provide a high-quality packaging and labeling service, feel free to contact me with all the details of your product and I will design an amazing label or packaging for it. 

Thank you for considering me for your project.

Best regards,
Shafequl.

Hello, I am an experienced graphic designer with expertise in designing logos and full brand identity for both startup and established businesses. 

A strong brand identity design is crucial for any business looking to rebrand or establish a stronger brand image. It helps your business get recognized among your target audience, establish a personal interest with the brand and drive the success of your business. As a graphic designer, I can help you achieve this.

My services include creating a branded logo design, developing a brand style guide, designing business cards, letterheads, envelopes, packaging design, and other essential print design based on your brand identity.

If you work with me, you can expect a high-quality design, consistent brand messaging and a personalized service tailored specifically to your business. I'm excited to discuss your business and branding needs and help you establish a strong branding identity.

Please feel free to contact me with any questions. I look forward to hearing from you.

Best Regards,
Shafequl.

This project was for a client who needed a design for their Hemp Oil bottle and Box. They also needed high quality images for their Amazon listing.

First of all, I have made sure their label and packaging looks and compliments their existing brand colors. And then the design had lots of informations that needed to fit into the design and look nice at the same time. So I had explored many things and finalized this design.

The client was happy with the design and he got it listed in amazon for selling. optimize this for people who needs packaging design services

If you're in need of high-quality packaging design services, I would be happy to help! Recently, I completed a project for a client who needed a design for their Hemp Oil bottle and box, as well as high-quality images for their Amazon listing. 

One of the main challenges of this project was ensuring the label and packaging design complemented their existing brand colors. In addition, there was a lot of information that needed to fit into the design and flow seamlessly. I was able to explore different design ideas and ultimately landed on a design that the client was happy with. 

By choosing my packaging design services, you can expect a high level of attention to detail and a design that meets all of your specific needs. I understand how important it is to have packaging that looks good, represents your brand, and provides the necessary information that a customer needs. 

Please feel free to contact me if you have any questions or would like to discuss your own packaging design project. I look forward to helping your product stand out from the competition.

Regards,
Shafequl.

"Get Professional Label Design for Your Product Today!"

If you need a professional product Label for your product then you are in the right place. I will design a custom product label targeting your audience that will boost your sales and make your product more recognized.

What you'll get from me?

High-quality label design and customer service, If you have any concept or rough sketch of what you want your product label to look like then I can also create a professional work based on your concept!

How to get started?

To get the highest quality work from me, we must have good communication with each other. If you consult me and give me your design choices then I can assure you'll get the best design.

I will need:

All contents and ingredients
Size & Shape of the label
Any sample/references

Features:

100% Satisfaction Guaranteed
Fast and friendly response
Modern and minimal trendy design

I can also design and create amazing photos for your amazon, shopify, dropshipping products with your new or existing label.

Whether you need Cosmetic bottle Label, Hemp Oil & CBD Bottle Label, Beard Oil Label, Serum bottles and more. Feel free to reach out.


Thank you for visiting, Looking forward to working with you.  Optimize this for upwork customers who are looking for product label and packaging design

Hello there! Are you in search of a professional label and packaging designer for your product? Look no further, as I am here to help!

As an experienced graphic designer, I can provide you with a custom product label design that will help boost your sales and make your product more recognized among your target audience. I specialize in designing product labels that specifically target your audience, giving you a unique and professional design that will set your product apart from the competition.

By choosing my services, you can expect high-quality label design, exceptional customer service, and a fast response time. I make sure to stay in constant communication with you throughout the design process to ensure we work together to create a beautiful design that exceeds your expectations.

I can design and create amazing product photos on Amazon, Shopify, and dropshipping product listings using your new or existing label. Whether you need Cosmetic bottle Label, Hemp Oil & CBD bottle Label, Beard Oil Label, Serum bottles, and more, Feel free to reach out for a quick and effective solution.

Thank you for considering my services for your product label and packaging design needs. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Best Regards,
Shafequl.

Hello! How can I assist you today?
Do you know chinese laws? I have some questions

I'm sorry, I'm not a legal expert on Chinese laws. However, I can recommend that you consult with a legal professional or conduct in-depth research on the specific legal regulations you have questions about.
Yes, Tell me whether foreign students in china can work in china

Foreign students in China can work part-time while studying, but there are certain regulations that they need to follow.

According to Chinese regulations, foreign students are allowed to work on-campus part-time jobs without any special work permit. Moreover, foreign students who hold an X1 visa and study a bachelor's, master's, doctoral or higher degree programs in China, are allowed to work part-time off-campus, with the permission of their university or college. 

However, the total work hours of part-time work may not exceed 20 hours per week during their study period. 

Additionally, it's advisable for foreign students to consult the local authorities or their institution's international office to ensure that they are complying with all regulations regarding part-time work.

I hope this information helps. Let me know if you have any other questions.
what is the fine for illegal work study jobs in china
